title: DWS Manual Schema Hints
description: The single Agent-editable, reviewed manual input for existing Cobra command/parameter overrides and product/tool Agent-selection prose. This file never creates commands, flags, parameters, safety facts, or interfaces.

$schema.description: Keep this relative reference so editors and coding agents can discover this contract without network access.

commands.description: Exact, reviewed Cobra leaves to expose or refine. Go validation rejects duplicate cli_path values and stale command or flag references.

generated_by.description: Authoring mechanism, normally ai for the initial offline batch or human for a later hand revision.

examples.description: Executable examples using a reviewed primary/alias path and real Cobra flags and required arguments. Do not include --yes or a help-only example.

example_dispositions.description: Exact reviewed exceptions by zero-based example index. An omitted index always defaults to dry_run; runtime failures must never create an implicit exception.

index.description: Zero-based index into the enclosing tool's examples array. Go validation rejects duplicate and out-of-range indexes.

mode.description: The only explicit override. dry_run is the default and is never stored as a disposition.

reason_code.description: Narrow manual exception taxonomy. confirmation_required is derived automatically from final typed high-risk/user-confirmed safety and cannot be authored here; runtime errors, MCP resolution errors, and missing required arguments are never valid exceptions.

reason.description: Concrete reviewed explanation of why isolated dry-run execution is unsafe or nondeterministic.

use_when.description: Reviewed positive Agent-selection scenarios. For tools, each entry becomes an eval case whose expected result is the enclosing canonical tool.

avoid_when.description: Reviewed negative Agent-selection scenarios. For tools, each entry becomes an eval case that must not choose the enclosing canonical tool.

cli_path.description: Exact path of an existing public runnable Cobra leaf, without flags or wildcard characters. Prefer omitting the leading 'dws'.

canonical_path.description: Stable product.tool identity exposed by dws schema. It must not conflict with an identity already attached to the Cobra command.

reason.description: Reviewable explanation of why this command or parameter projection belongs in the stable Agent Schema. Describe intent, not implementation mechanics.

reviewed.description: Must be true. Unreviewed entries fail generation.

parameters.description: Optional Schema-only corrections keyed by an existing Cobra flag name without '--'. These values do not change Cobra help, flag types, or execution validation.

description.description: Agent-facing CLI parameter description. State accepted input and conditions concisely; do not copy secrets or runtime-discovered content.

property.description: Interface payload property populated by this existing CLI flag.

interface_type.description: Type after CLI-to-interface conversion. This does not change the real Cobra flag type.

required.description: Whether the flag is unconditionally required in the Agent-facing CLI contract. This does not add or remove Cobra execution validation.

required_when.description: Concise condition under which the flag is required. Use this instead of required=true for conditional requirements.

commands.reason: Expose the existing smart-category helper and preserve its reviewed CLI-to-interface parameter projection.

ai-agent-contract-v1.reason: Generate one reviewed Agent-selection baseline from Registry, Cobra Help, and Skill evidence.

use_when: 需要查询或管理钉钉会话和消息时

chat.create_smart_conv_category.agent_summary: 按条件创建智能会话分组
use_when: 需要自动归集符合名称、成员或关键词条件的会话时
avoid_when: 只需查看现有分组时不要使用
examples: dws chat category create-smart --name 项目群
